violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2025

Beans was observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Beans were placed in hot hold unit 30 minutes prior after being heated on stove to above 165DF. Hot hold unit was turned to a hotter setting. Beans were reheated on stove to 165DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The cutting boards in the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Soybean meat was observed hot held on stove top at 125 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food item was held for less than 1 hour and reheated at the time of the inspection to 212 degrees F. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

Cut tomatoes, tofu, Pico de Gallo, cut lettuces, and beans were observed held on counter between 52-64 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview of the person in charge food items were held for less than 2 hours prior inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Some food items were held with in an ice bath and other were reheated for hot hold. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

Quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million(ppm) at the spray bottle. A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings at the 2nd floor storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The door to the outside, located in the dinning area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
Take out boxes were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the 3 bay sink sanitizing solution for the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The facility is lacking a 3 bay sink at the bar area to wash, rinse, and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall fan in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023
The door to the customer/employee toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the 2nd floor storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
